title: Fodurant

{{Quote|I'll bring everyone down on you—military and New Republic Intelligence. After the stunts you've pulled, you'll be lucky to get a life sentence on Fodurant.|[[Telbun]] to [[Reck Desh]]|<ref name="The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial">''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''</ref>}}
'''Fodurant''' was a [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Prison/Legends|prison]] [[Planet/Legends|world]].

In [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] was warned by the controller of a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] base that they knew he had been out to obtain evidence for imprisoning them for twenty [[Standard year/Legends|years]] on either Fodurant or [[Beauchen/Legends|Beauchen]].

During [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], [[Reck Desh]] went to a secret appointment in [[Kuat City]], and was watched closely by his men [[Ven (Peace Brigade)|Ven]] and [[Wotson]]. [[Telbun]] threatened him with the [[New Republic/Legends#Military|army]] and all [[New Republic Intelligence Service|intelligence service]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], saying that he would be fortunate to get life imprisonment in Fodurant if they caught him.
